name: @byeongsu-hong/agent-fleet
description: Parallel, isolated QA orchestration for native desktop apps via pluggable drivers

scripts.build: bun build src/cli.ts src/drivers/tauri.ts --target=bun --external '@byeongsu-hong/tauri-agent-plugin/*' --outdir=dist && vite build
scripts.test:e2e:runtimes: bun run src/cli.ts test smoke smoke smoke --runtime wry --jobs 3 --config test/fixtures/dual-runtime-app/.agent/fleet.json && bun run src/cli.ts test smoke smoke smoke --runtime cef --jobs 3 --config test/fixtures/dual-runtime-app/.agent/fleet.json
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun test && bun run build
